chunks.en: At work I use two screens every day.
chunks.ja: 仕事では毎日、画面を2つ使っています。

chunks.en: One screen is for chat with my team.
chunks.ja: 片方の画面はチームとのチャット用です。

chunks.en: The other screen is for my main work.
chunks.ja: もう片方の画面はメインの作業用です。

chunks.en: Two screens help me work much faster.
chunks.ja: 2つの画面のおかげで、ずっと速く作業できます。

chunks.en: When my eyes get tired, I make the letters bigger.
chunks.ja: 目が疲れたときは、文字を大きくします。

chunks.en: Bigger letters are much easier for me to read.
chunks.ja: 大きい文字のほうが、私にはずっと読みやすいです。

chunks.en: Sometimes I clean my screen with a soft cloth.
chunks.ja: たまに、柔らかい布で画面を拭きます。

chunks.en: A clean screen makes my day more pleasant.
chunks.ja: きれいな画面だと、一日がより気持ちよくなります。

outline: Opening: I use two screens at work
Point 1: One for chat, one for work
Point 2: Bigger letters when eyes are tired, plus cleaning
Wrap-up: Screens make work faster and nicer

modelTalk.text: I use two screens at work every day. They help me a lot. One screen is for chat. I read messages from my team there. The other screen is for my work. I write and check my files on it. So I don't need to switch windows. It's easy and fast. Sometimes my eyes get tired. When that happens, I make the letters bigger. It's better for me. I can read without pain. I also like a clean screen. Sometimes I clean it with a soft cloth. I don't use water. The soft cloth is enough. My screens look nice and clear. I really like my setup.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about my computer screens.
chunks.ja: 今日は私のパソコンの画面について話したいです。

chunks.en: At work I use two screens every day.
chunks.ja: 仕事では毎日画面を2つ使います。

chunks.en: One screen is for chat with my team.
chunks.ja: 片方の画面はチームとのチャット用です。

chunks.en: The other screen is for my real work.
chunks.ja: もう片方の画面は本当の作業用です。

chunks.en: When my eyes get tired, I make the letters bigger.
chunks.ja: 目が疲れたら、文字を大きくします。

chunks.en: Sometimes I clean my screen with a soft cloth.
chunks.ja: たまに柔らかい布で画面を拭きます。

chunks.en: So two screens really help me work better.
chunks.ja: だから画面が2つあると、もっと良く働けます。

outline: Opening: talk about my computer screens
Point 1: two screens, one for chat, one for work
Point 2: bigger letters when tired, clean with a cloth
Wrap-up: two screens help me work better

modelTalk.text: I use two screens at work. I like this a lot. One screen is small, and the other is big. I put my chat on one screen. My friends send me messages there. The other screen is for my real work. So I don't mix them up. That's very helpful for me. Sometimes my eyes get tired. Then I make the letters bigger. It's easy to read now. My eyes feel better after that. I also clean my screens often. I use a soft cloth for this. I don't use water on them. My screens look clean and bright. I'm happy with my two screens.
